title: LegacyArmorCompat
description: Add support for the legacy format of armor textures for 1.21 - 1.21.11
body:
# Legacy Armor Compatibility for Minecraft 1.21.4

This mod restores support for the legacy armor texture path, allowing resource packs to continue using the original `minecraft/textures/models/armor` directory despite the changes in Minecraft 1.21.4.

![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0c2f015f38d92d890b66a048951f79896012039.png)
